title: Grants Pass, Oregon
html:
Grants Pass is Yahir's hometown — a small town in southern Oregon — and the geographic anchor for everything pre-Austin in his life. Per Memory he lived there until the mid-September 2025 move. Across the corpus, Grants Pass is less a place that gets described than a place that holds the rest of his story: it's the address scholarships were mailed to, the place he flew back to between college terms and the China chapter, and the staging ground for the peacock bar incident.

The earliest snapshot is the Christmas Eve 2018 Pokémon-type-chart note (2018 12 24 normal neutral to everything) — 16-year-old Yahir at home, transcribing the entire 18-type matchup lattice with the title "Normal > Neutral to Everything," the most efficient self-description in the corpus. The 2019 letter-to-self on the Phoenix→Portland flight (2019 09 10 low key writing this to end) is the home he was leaving for school. The 2020 COVID watchlist (2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist) is 17-year-old Yahir from Grants Pass juggling stock picks, FBLA admin, dad's loan paperwork, and Walmart applications during lockdown.

The institutional debts run through this town: 2025 04 20 people i am indebted to for helping me names the Boys and Girls Club (almost certainly the Grants Pass chapter) and the Ford Family Foundation (Oregon scholarship) — half of his named gratitude debts are to local Oregon institutions that scaffold poor and small-town kids. The Peacock Bar incident in early March 2025 is plausibly a contributing trigger for the eventual Austin move six months later — Grants Pass becoming a place to leave, not a place to stay. The return from China in December 2024 most likely landed back here for the gap between chapters.

Grants Pass is the small-town counterweight to every adventure: Shanghai, Xi'an, Chengdu, Nepal, India — Yahir leaves and returns, leaves and returns, until Austin becomes the first real exit.

Source summaries

  • 2018 11 21 voice memo 1339 — earliest preserved voice-memo (ambient noise only)
  • 2018 12 24 normal neutral to everything — Christmas Eve at home, Pokémon chart
  • 2019 03 14 voice memo 1625 — broker investing-101 conversation in town
  • 2019 09 10 low key writing this to end — leaving for school
  • 2020 01 02 voice memo 0015 — New Year's time-capsule monologue from Albertsons lot
  • 2020 03 14 voice memo 1927 — Oregon-shutdown-day twin-bed fragment
  • 2024 09 23 east china normal university putuo campus zaoyang road 788 haomen 2 — Mandarin-class hometown prompt about Grants Pass
  • 2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist — pandemic lockdown
  • 2024 12 14 departing china — implied return point
  • 2025 03 01 peacock bar incident — the conflict event
  • 2025 04 20 people i am indebted to for helping me — local institutions named

  • boys and girls club — local institution
  • ford family foundation — Oregon scholarship
  • china chapter — the contrast chapter
  • corvallis or — the in-between college town
  • grants pass teen era — tagged sub-period
